prompt: Create a wide cinematic anime-style fantasy academy campus illustration of Luminalia Magical Alchemy Academy on a bright clear day, viewed from a low courtyard perspective looking toward a grand central school building. The architecture is elegant European neo-Gothic and magical-academy style, with a symmetrical cream-stone facade, blue slate roofs, ornate gold trim, arched stained-glass windows, dormer windows, sharp towers, spires, and a tall central gable above a large arched entrance reached by broad stone steps. The main facade has 3 prominent sections: a left wing, a taller central entrance tower section, and a right wing, plus an elevated glass-and-stone corridor extending to a separate building on the far right. Add vertical purple banners with gold borders hanging on the central facade. In the foreground, show a spacious paved courtyard with circular alchemical magic-circle patterns inlaid into the stone, formal flower beds full of purple, white, pink, and blue flowers, clipped greenery, and trees casting soft shadows. Include 4 prominent magical devices: one large brass armillary sphere on a pedestal in the left courtyard, one glowing purple crystal lamp near the far left edge, one glowing purple crystal lamp near the right edge, and one large floating crystal-and-ring chandelier-like magical artifact in the upper right sky. Add additional small blue crystal fountains and subtle glowing magical accents around the garden and entrance. The sky should be vivid sapphire blue with scattered fluffy white clouds, sparkling motes of light, and warm sunlit highlights. Use highly detailed polished anime background art, fantasy visual novel scenery, luminous colors, crisp linework, intricate ornamentation, soft bloom, atmospheric depth, no people, no readable text, 16:9 composition.
